Off Calendar Jun-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HASSAN KURDI MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-562548 WITH CASE CGC-17-562447.

GRANTED. The parties stipulated to the relief. Cases CGC-17-562447 and CGC-17-562548 are consolidated for all purposes. Case CGC-17-562447 is designated the lead case. The trial date is October 28, 2019.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
